testcase.name: Contact form shows validation errors on empty submit and clears them after filling fields
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the home page.................................................passed When I navigate to the contact page.........................................passed And I click the submit button...............................................passed Then I should see forename validation error "Forename is required"..........passed And I should see email validation error "Email is required".................passed And I should see message validation error "Message is required".............passed When I fill in forename "Srikanth"..........................................passed And I fill in email "srikanth@test.com".....................................passed And I fill in message "This is an automated test message"...................passed Then the forename validation error should not be visible....................passed And the email validation error should not be visible........................passed And the message validation error should not be visible......................passed

testcase.name: Successful contact form submission - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the home page.................................................passed When I navigate to the contact page.........................................passed And I fill in forename "run1"...............................................passed And I fill in email "testrun1@example.com"..................................passed And I fill in message "Automated test message for run1".....................passed And I click the submit button...............................................passed Then I should see a success confirmation message containing "Thanks"........passed

testcase.name: Successful contact form submission - #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the home page.................................................passed When I navigate to the contact page.........................................passed And I fill in forename "run2"...............................................passed And I fill in email "testrun2@example.com"..................................passed And I fill in message "Automated test message for run2".....................passed And I click the submit button...............................................passed Then I should see a success confirmation message containing "Thanks"........passed

testcase.name: Successful contact form submission - #1.3
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the home page.................................................passed When I navigate to the contact page.........................................passed And I fill in forename "run3"...............................................passed And I fill in email "testrun3@example.com"..................................passed And I fill in message "Automated test message for run3".....................passed And I click the submit button...............................................passed Then I should see a success confirmation message containing "Thanks"........passed

testcase.name: Successful contact form submission - #1.4
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the home page.................................................passed When I navigate to the contact page.........................................passed And I fill in forename "run4"...............................................passed And I fill in email "testrun4@example.com"..................................passed And I fill in message "Automated test message for run4".....................passed And I click the submit button...............................................passed Then I should see a success confirmation message containing "Thanks"........passed

testcase.name: Successful contact form submission - #1.5
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the home page.................................................passed When I navigate to the contact page.........................................passed And I fill in forename "run5"...............................................passed And I fill in email "testrun5@example.com"..................................passed And I fill in message "Automated test message for run5".....................passed And I click the submit button...............................................passed Then I should see a success confirmation message containing "Thanks"........passed

testcase.name: Cart subtotals and grand total are calculated correctly

failure.message: [Subtotal for 'Fluffy Bunny' should be 49.95 (unit price 9.99 Ã— 5)] expected: 49.95 but was: 39.96

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: [Subtotal for 'Fluffy Bunny' should be 49.95 (unit price 9.99 Ã— 5)] expected: 49.95 but was: 39.96 at com.planit.stepdefs.CartSteps.theSubtotalForShouldEqualUnitPriceMultipliedBy(CartSteps.java:81) at ✽.the subtotal for "Fluffy Bunny" should equal unit price multiplied by 5(classpath:features/jupiter_toys.feature:45)
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the home page.................................................passed When I navigate to the shop page............................................passed And I add 2 of "Stuffed Frog" to the cart...................................passed And I add 5 of "Fluffy Bunny" to the cart...................................passed And I add 3 of "Valentine Bear" to the cart.................................passed And I navigate to the cart page.............................................passed Then the subtotal for "Stuffed Frog" should equal unit price multiplied by 2.passed And the subtotal for "Fluffy Bunny" should equal unit price multiplied by 5.failed And the subtotal for "Valentine Bear" should equal unit price multiplied by 3.skipped And the grand total should equal the sum of all subtotals...................skipped
